  Title format: Conventional Commits, e.g. "fix(cli): ..." / "feat(policy): ..." / "docs: ...".
  Please keep the headings below — fill each section in.

## Problem

<!-- What problem does this PR solve? Link the issue it addresses (issue-first, please). -->

## Solution

<!-- How does it solve it? Note any alternatives you considered. -->

## Testing

<!-- How was this verified? New/updated unit tests, manual runs, fixture output, etc. -->

## New Dependencies

None

<!-- If not "None": list each new dependency and justify it — this project has a strong zero-dependency bias. -->

## Checklist

- [ ] One concern per PR
- [ ] Conventional Commit title (drives the changelog for user-facing changes)
- [ ] Typecheck, lint, tests, and build pass locally
- [ ] Public API changes have TSDoc
- [ ] Docs updated if behavior changed
